Serra Honda Sales
Live

A chat bubble your visitors can open to talk with your AI assistant in real time.

Caroline answers shopper questions about Honda inventory, pricing, financing,
trade-in value, and test-drive scheduling, then captures the lead for the BDC
team. Embed this on inventory and landing pages where shoppers are browsing
vehicles.

Add to your website
Copy code

Paste this one line into your website where you want the widget to appear.

<script async src="https://studio.huminic.app/nexxus-widget.min.js?id=serra-honda-sales-chat"></script>
Live demo
Open in new tab

This is exactly what your visitors will see.

Customize wording (advanced)
Preview
Serra Honda

inputs.value:
---
slug: serra-honda-sales-chat
mode: chat
agent: caroline
title: Serra Honda Sales
greeting: Hi! I'm Caroline at Serra Honda. Ask me about new and pre-owned inventory, pricing, trade-ins, or book a test drive.
type: widget
status: draft
---

# Serra Honda Sales Chat

Caroline answers shopper questions about Honda inventory, pricing, financing,
trade-in value, and test-drive scheduling, then captures the lead for the BDC
team. Embed this on inventory and landing pages where shoppers are browsing
vehicles.

Notifications
Serra Honda
·
Notifications
Notifications

Decide who gets alerted when something happens — a new lead, an inbound message, or (as they come online) a Guardian condition or query result. Each rule is “when this happens, notify this person.”

No rules yet — new leads currently fall back to duanekwells@gmail.com. Add a rule to route specific conditions to specific people.
When (condition)	Notify (recipient)	Channel	Label	On	
No routing rules. Add one below.
+ Add rule
Save

SMS notifications are reserved (email is delivered today). Guardian conditions become selectable once the Business / Performance Guardians are live; until then you can type a custom condition id to pre-stage a rule.
